mapper.select: SELECT AUDIO_ID, WORD_ID, LANGUAGE_CODE, VOICE_NAME, AUDIO_TYPE, SPEAKING_RATE, AUDIO_URL, STORAGE_KEY, PROVIDER, FORMAT, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_WORD_AUDIO WHERE WORD_ID = #{wordId} AND LANGUAGE_CODE = #{languageCode} AND AUDIO_TYPE = #{audioType} AND SPEAKING_RATE = #{speakingRate} AND VOICE_NAME = #{voiceName} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_WORD_AUDIO ( WORD_ID, LANGUAGE_CODE, VOICE_NAME, AUDIO_TYPE, SPEAKING_RATE, AUDIO_URL, STORAGE_KEY, PROVIDER, FORMAT, IS_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( #{wordId}, #{languageCode}, #{voiceName}, #{audioType}, #{speakingRate}, #{audioUrl}, #{storageKey}, #{provider}, #{format}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_WORD_AUDIO SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE WORD_ID = #{wordId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
